title: Democrat Taylor Rehmet Wins Deep-Red Texas State Senate Seat In Landslide, Major Upset

Der Demokrat Taylor Rehmet besiegte am Samstag einen von Trump unterstützten Republikaner bei der Wahl um einen Sitz im Senat des US-Bundesstaates Texas, den der Präsident dreimal zweistellig gewann.
en: Democrat Taylor Rehmet Wins Deep-Red Texas State Senate Seat In Landslide, Major Upset. Democrat Taylor Rehmet defeated a Trump-endorsed Republican in a Saturday election for a Texas State Senate seat the president won by double digits three times.

title: Rs 50 crore works to fix NH 66 defects in Pernem soon
description: A significant investment of Rs 50 crore will soon address defects on NH 66 in Pernem, featuring the construction of a vital underpass at Naibag to improve safety and landslide protection measures in landslide-prone areas, funded by the Union highways ministry.
content:
Follow Us On Social Media
Trump Warns Massive Armada Heading To Iran, Khamenei Says U.S Attack Will Trigger Full-Blown...Japan Retrieves Rare Earth Minerals From 6,000-metre Depths In Major Deep-sea… [+1579 chars]
de: Rs 50 crore arbeitet an der baldigen Behebung von NH 66-Mängeln in Pernem. Mit einer erheblichen Investition von 50 Crore Rupien werden bald Mängel am NH 66 in Pernem behoben. Dazu gehört der Bau einer wichtigen Unterführung bei Naibag zur Verbesserung der Sicherheit und der Erdrutschschutzmaßnahmen in erdrutschgefährdeten Gebieten, finanziert vom Straßenministerium der Union.
en: Rs 50 crore works to fix NH 66 defects in Pernem soon. A significant investment of Rs 50 crore will soon address defects on NH 66 in Pernem, featuring the construction of a vital underpass at Naibag to improve safety and landslide protection measures in landslide-prone areas, funded by the Union highways ministry.
la: Rs L crore opera figere NH 66 vitia in Pernem mox. Insignis obsidio Rs 50 crore mox vitia in NH 66 in Pernem alloquetur, constructionem in Naibag vitalis passi ad meliorem salutem et tutelam lapsus emendare mensuras in locis proclivis, a ministerio viae Unionis fundi.
